name: oh-my-codex
description: Multi-agent orchestration layer for OpenAI Codex CLI

scripts.build:full: npm run build && npm run build:explore:release && npm run build:sparkshell
scripts.prepack: npm run build && npm run clean:native-package-assets
scripts.test: npm run build && npm run test:node && node dist/scripts/generate-catalog-docs.js --check
scripts.coverage:team-critical: npm run build && c8 --all --src dist/team --src dist/state --include 'dist/team/**/*.js' --include 'dist/state/**/*.js' --exclude '**/__tests__/**' --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --report-dir coverage/team --check-coverage --lines=78 --functions=90 --branches=70 --statements=78 node --test $(find dist/team/__tests__ dist/state/__tests__ -name '*.test.js')
scripts.coverage:ts:full: npm run build && c8 --all --src dist --exclude '**/__tests__/**' --exclude 'dist/bin/**' --exclude 'dist/**/*.d.ts' --reporter=text-summary --reporter=lcov --reporter=json-summary --report-dir coverage/ts-full node --test $(find dist -name '*.test.js')
scripts.test:compat:rust: cargo build && OMX_COMPAT_TARGET=./target/debug/omx npm run test:compat:node

author: Yeachan Heo
